subject: test sample
text:
Hi Support Team,

I'm writing again regarding the ongoing performance issues with the dashboard. Since my last message, the situation has become more critical - the system is now completely inaccessible during peak hours. This is severely impacting our business operations.

I've tried clearing my cache and using different browsers, but the issue persists. Could you please escalate this matter? We need immediate assistance.

Thanks,
John
html:
Hi Support Team,

I'm writing again regarding the ongoing performance issues with the dashboard. Since my last message, the situation has become more critical - the system is now completely inaccessible during peak hours. This is severely impacting our business operations.

I've tried clearing my cache and using different browsers, but the issue persists. Could you please escalate this matter? We need immediate assistance.

Thanks,
John
